_comment: Example MCPB manifest for Claude Desktop. Place at the root of your .mcpb bundle. See rules/mcpb-manifest.md for correctness rules.
name: my-mcpb
description: Example MCPB that exposes a file-search tool over a local directory.

user_config.label: Root directory
user_config.description: Folder to search. Tool calls scope to this directory only.

user_config.label: Default max results
user_config.description: Default max_results when a tool call doesn't specify.

tools.name: search_files
tools.description: Search files by name pattern under the configured root directory.
